title: PosSender
description: This small modification allows you to send your current position in the chat with one button.
body: PosSender This modification will allow you to send your current position without having to retype your current position to be able to send it in chat. After clicking button (default Y) the modification will automatically send your current position along with the dimension in the chat. The message will look like this: "-102/60/56/Overworld". This modification requires Fabric API to work! This modification is fully client-side.
